purpose: Codex producer fills a runtime warehouse with 100-candidate READY micro-batches while School consumer independently consumes READY batches with bounded waiting and heartbeat/stale checks.

warehouse_contract.producer: Codex receives one 1000-candidate patch and writes 10 micro-batches of 100 into runtime warehouse.
warehouse_contract.consumer: School consumes only READY marker + READY JSONL. WRITING is never consumed.
warehouse_contract.school_ahead: If no READY, School uses heartbeat + bounded wait; it does not launch duplicate producer.
warehouse_contract.codex_ahead: Backlog within one patch is allowed up to micro-batch count; next patch is blocked until current warehouse is closed/cleaned.
warehouse_contract.memory_progress: Only ABSORBED counts. READY/VALIDATED/NORMALIZED do not count as memory update.
warehouse_contract.cleanup: Runtime warehouse is transient; tracked repo keeps compact reports only.

boundary: Validation used mock READY micro-batch and wait scenario; no real Codex and no absorption.
